plugins.name: plugin-smith
plugins.description: Scaffold new Claude Code plugins and health-check existing ones against the official spec.

plugins.name: fork-a-foundry
plugins.description: Bootstrap your own self-running plugin workshop and marketplace — the loop that built this one, in a box.

plugins.name: commit-craft
plugins.description: Conventional-commit discipline: a skill that writes great messages and a fail-open guard hook that blocks malformed ones.

plugins.name: session-recap
plugins.description: One command ends the session properly: an appended, dated handoff — what changed, decisions, open questions, next steps.
